headline: Ravens Regime: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Ravens Regime is projected #6 of 16 with a 640.30 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by Tyler Warren, Lamar Jackson, and Derrick Henry. The immediate priority is improving the RB slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, Ravens Regime traded with Northside Kings and acquired Tyler Warren while sending RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (Rapid Valley Annihilation). Tyler Warren is now the current TE starter at 97.2 C-AVI and 90.5 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the RB slot above Kyle Monangai's 55.6 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 65.6 C-AVI would directly attack the 6.10-point projected gap to Corgi Loaf Baking Co..
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On October 14, Southside Savages traded with Roster 3 and acquired Tetairoa McMillan while sending 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages), 2026 Round 2 (Southside Savages). Tetairoa McMillan is now the current WR starter at 85.6 C-AVI and 87.2 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

rival_below.summary: On October 14, Southside Savages traded with Roster 3 and acquired Tetairoa McMillan while sending 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages), 2026 Round 2 (Southside Savages). Tetairoa McMillan is now the current WR starter at 85.6 C-AVI and 87.2 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #6 of 16 at 640.30 lineup C-AVI. Corgi Loaf Baking Co. is immediately above at 646.40, a gap of 6.10. Southside Savages is immediately behind at 626.50.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Tyler Warren (97.2), Lamar Jackson (97.1), and Derrick Henry (92.9).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 15, Ravens Regime traded with Northside Kings and acquired Tyler Warren while sending RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (Rapid Valley Annihilation). Tyler Warren is now the current TE starter at 97.2 C-AVI and 90.5 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the RB slot above Kyle Monangai's 55.6 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 65.6 C-AVI would directly attack the 6.10-point projected gap to Corgi Loaf Baking Co.. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Kyle Monangai is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 55.6. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 9 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
